payload:
# PR Desk

Build a native macOS app called PR Desk.

## Product vision

PR Desk is an always-visible, calm desktop companion for GitHub pull requests.

It should feel like a native macOS desktop widget, similar to the Clock widget: always visible, draggable, lightweight, and glanceable.

The goal is to reduce GitHub/email checking and make it easy to act on PRs through Claude Code.

## Core UI

### Desktop widgets

Create two separate draggable desktop widgets:

1. **My PRs**
   - Shows PRs auth... [truncated, 3253 chars total]
Step 1 build verification: task-1778215146-5f09 (code-assist:pr-desk:step-01:build-verify) - Build PRDesk app with xcodebuild to verify project setup
build succeeded, app bundle verified at DerivedData

Task task-1778215146-5f09: Build succeeded but uses wrong window architecture. WindowGroup creates standard app windows, not desktop widgets. Must use NSPanel or custom NSWindow with floating level for always-visible draggable widgets. Foundation must be corrected before feature work.
Architecture fixed: WindowGroup replaced with FloatingPanel (NSPanel). App now uses borderless, translucent, floating panel with draggable behavior. Build succeeded.
Build verified, FloatingPanel architecture correct, app launches as desktop widget. Task task-1778215146-5f09 acceptance met.
Step 1 complete: FloatingPanel architecture verified. Ready for Step 2: GitHub Data Layer.
{"task_id": "task-1778215785-c96e", "task_key": "code-assist:pr-desk:step-02:fetch-my-prs", "description": "Implement gh CLI wrapper to fetch users authored PRs using gh pr list --author @me --json"}
task-1778215785-c96e: GitHubClient.fetchMyPRs() implemented - build succeeds, JSON parsing verified, empty array handling works
task-1778215785-c96e: Critical bug - gh pr list requires git repo context, fails outside git directory. Must use 'gh search prs' instead. Real harness test confirmed command fails with exit code 1.
task-1778215785-c96e: Fixed gh pr list repo context bug. Replaced with gh search prs. Build succeeds, integration test passes, works from any directory.
task-1778215785-c96e: gh search prs fix is correct, but hardcoded /opt/homebrew/bin/gh breaks portability. Use /usr/bin/env gh or check multiple paths.
Fixed hardcoded gh path. Now uses /usr/bin/env gh for portability across Mac architectures. Build succeeds, fetches 30 PRs correctly from non-git directory.
task-1778215785-c96e: All acceptance criteria met. Build succeeds, fetches PRs correctly from non-git directory using portable /usr/bin/env gh approach. Real harness verified. No bugs found.
task-1778215785-c96e closed. Step 2 has 3 open tasks remaining: fetch-tagged-prs, data-model, refresh-mechanism
task-1778215792-eb01: fetch-tagged-prs - Implement gh CLI wrapper for review-requested PRs

Implemented fetchReviewRequestedPRs() method in GitHubClient.swift. Uses gh search prs --review-requested=@me. Build succeeds, real harness verified 30 PRs fetched and parsed correctly from non-git directory.

task-1778215792-eb01 (fetch-tagged-prs): fetchReviewRequestedPRs() implemented correctly. Build succeeds, 30 PRs verified via real harness from non-git directory. All acceptance criteria met. No bugs found.
